name: workflow_template
description: Hidden template for workflow.json, workflow.md, and config.json.

nodes.description: Template placeholder. Copy this directory and replace the workflow before use.
nodes.code:
outputs['templateOnly'] = True
outputs['message'] = 'Hidden workflow template; copy before use.'

publishConfigContract.api: When config.publish.type is api_service, the publish page shows only API publish controls.
publishConfigContract.syslog: When config.triggers only contains syslog, the publish page shows only syslog listener start/stop controls.
publishConfigContract.kafka: When config.triggers only contains kafka, the publish page shows only kafka consumer start/stop controls.
publishConfigContract.schedule: When config.triggers only contains schedule, the publish page shows only schedule start/stop controls.
